content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Yet Another Two Integers Problem". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1409/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. Each test case contains two space-separated integers a and b.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the result of the operation in a new line.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Compare the given integers and perform the required operation based on their values.

code.Python3:
import sys
T = int(input())
for _ in range(T):
    a, b = map(int, input().split())
    print(max(a, b))
